description: This conceptual diagram illustrates a land cover change scenario showing the decrease in area of an Olive grove (2.2.2) and its mapping within Riparian Zones (RZ) products between 2012 and 2018. The diagram comprises four panels: "IMAGE 2012", "IMAGE 2018", "RZ 2012", and "RZ 2018". In all panels, the green areas represent the "Natural & semi-natural grassland (4.2.x)" class, and the yellow L
